board_csa_architect.notes: Clean schema addition. Views with security_barrier are the correct PG pattern for column-level restriction. No scalability concern — views are read-only metadata projections.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Defense-in-depth hardening. Eliminates the only remaining path where 0B could theoretically see raw content. SECURITY DEFINER with restricted role is the gold standard.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No AI/VRAM impact. Pure SQL migration. No steering vector or model changes.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Additive migration, no downtime risk. Views are read-only. Rollback is DROP VIEW.

board_red_team.notes: Failure scenarios: 1) View owner role granted excessive privileges — mitigated by NOLOGIN + SELECT-only. 2) New columns added to base table but not view — mitigated by explicit column list. 3) View bypass via schema search_path manipulation — mitigated by schema-qualified names.
